_publications._publicationTitle: Induction of apoptosis in neurofibromatosis type 1 malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumor cell lines by a combination of novel farnesyl transferase inhibitors and lovastatin.

_contextSnippet: However, when 500 nM 1 or 2 were used in combination with 500 nM lovastatin, we observed a reduction of ST88-14 proliferation
details: Reduction of proliferation observed when 500 nM FTI compounds were used in combination with 500 nM lovastatin
